name: MHA - CYOS
description:
🔸🔶My Hero Academia - Choose Your Own Story🔶🔸

🔸What's Included?🔸

I've pretty much added any characters I could think of which includes:

  • 1-A [Did our girl Toru justice so the bot knows that her quirk is light refraction, not transparency]

  • 1-B

  • Big Three

  • UA Faculty (and facilities) [Also gave Lunch Rush a quirk: Calorie]

  • Pro/Popular Heroes (+Star)

  • League of Villains (and unique Nomu)

  • Civilians (Midoriya, Bakugo, and Todoroki families + Tsukauchi

I've also added 3 extra intros, being at the Practical Exam or a New Student in either 1-A or 1-B.

What else do I have planned for this bot?

  • 9 total example intros (Entrance Exam, 1A, 1B, 1C (Gen Ed), 1H (Support), Faculty, Pro Hero, Villain, and Vigilante)

  • Adding more locations (Kamino, Jaku, Hosu, Troy, etc.)

  • Adding more characters (as requested).

  • A complete timeline to map from the start of the series to (potentially) 8 years after the Final War.

  • Adding more to the status bar at the bottom, maybe a currency system if that gets traction?

🔸Important:🔸

Aged Up: It goes without saying, that all the characters are aged up to 18+. This takes place in a College AU where U.A. High is instead U.A. University.

If the bot talks for you: I've added measures to try and prevent this, though ultimately this is an LLM issue and not one I can solve.

Proxy: This bot works better with proxy than without, don't complain if JLLM has issues with it.

🔸Closing Words:🔸

I'm rather new to the whole "making bots" scene, so while I'm absolutely open to constructive criticism, I don't need comments flooded with negativity. Though do feel free to leave ideas and requests on whatever new bots I release and I'll see about getting around to it. Oh! And make sure to check out the creators I've listed on my page, I've been rather attached to a majority of their bots and really like their content.

🔸Update:🔸

Happy New Year! With the holidays finally over and my Internet finally getting fixed, I've taken the opportunity to clean up my lorebooks a bit. And where 'clean up' usually means condense, I've instead spread the entries throughout more. This is just so when I make other bots, I'll be able to tag on just the bots with corresponding entries. I'm still playtesting my events lorebook, so that's on the way, and I haven't had much time to work on other intros. Aside from the ones I listed above, are there any you guys would be interested in?
creator: Kipius
